name: BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access
notes: Building block to track rules that indicate a user accessing some phishing or malware related site.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following UBA : Browsed to Malicious Website, UBA : Browsed to Phishing Website, UBA : Browsed to Scam/Questionable/Illegal Website, UBA : User Accessing Risky IP, Botnet, UBA : User Accessing Risky IP, Malware
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following UBA : Browsed to Malicious Website, UBA : Browsed to Phishing Website, UBA : Browsed to Scam/Questionable/Illegal Website, UBA : User Accessing Risky IP, Botnet, UBA : User Accessing Risky IP, Malware
